attributes.name: Placement Prototype
attributes.summary: PlacementPrototype is a card-based component that enables interactive drag-and-drop placement of payloads into predefined target zones, supporting both mouse and keyboard interactions. It manages placement state, provides visual and auditory feedback, and includes features such as dwell-open folders, async cross-realm job scheduling, and a place palette overlay. Its primary purpose is to facilitate intuitive spatial placement and organization of items within a prototype interface, with detailed UI elements for source payloads, targets, placement history, and accessibility considerations.
